categories.definition: Bounded grouping for architecture-support roles that define boundaries, wiring, contracts, command surfaces, and responsibility connection points.
Bounded grouping for roles that support build pipelines, packaging, compilation, bundling, and build-oriented automation.
Bounded grouping for core concern-owned responsibility lanes such as structure, behavior, reference, and output.
Bounded grouping for style-overlay roles that mutate presentation-linked structure or output without taking over the corresponding core concern lane.
Bounded grouping for roles that coordinate asynchronous, parallel, worker, or concurrent execution responsibility.
Bounded grouping for roles that define configurable settings, environment values, runtime options, or setup policy.
Bounded grouping for roles that define data shapes, schemas, transfer objects, and typed structural contracts.
Bounded grouping for legacy roles retained for detection, migration guidance, compatibility checks, or historical interpretation.
Bounded grouping for roles that produce human-facing specifications, policies, workflows, plans, audits, and healthcheck documentation.
Bounded grouping for demonstrative, tutorial, sample, or reference-example artifacts.
Bounded grouping for prototypes, spikes, playground work, and exploratory artifacts with intentionally relaxed stability expectations.
Bounded grouping for machine-generated artifacts where generated status affects ownership, validation, or editing expectations.
Bounded grouping for roles that define registries, indexes, identifiers, catalogs, anchors, manifests, and reusable token references.
Bounded grouping for roles that adapt, map, resolve, mediate, call, or gateway across system, service, or interface boundaries.
Bounded grouping for roles that define locale, language, translation, internationalization, or audience-localized artifacts.
Bounded grouping for roles that represent migration, transition, conversion, or version-shift work.
Bounded grouping for roles that define transport, network exchange, communication, or protocol-facing responsibility.
Bounded grouping for roles that produce logging, telemetry, monitoring, measurement, or runtime visibility signals.
Bounded grouping for operational roles such as deployment, infrastructure, environment support, release movement, and repository operations.
Bounded grouping for roles that express performance-sensitive behavior, measurement, optimization, or runtime efficiency concerns.
Bounded grouping for roles that manage storage, caching, persistence, retrieval, or retained state.
Bounded grouping for roles that support validation, tests, fixtures, mocks, benchmarks, and quality evidence.
Bounded grouping for roles that define authentication, authorization, cryptography, secrets, or protection-oriented responsibility.
Bounded grouping for roles that establish entry, host, route, or surface-level system structure.
Bounded grouping for developer-facing automation, scripts, generators, CLIs, validators, and repository tooling artifacts.
Bounded grouping for vendored, third-party, externally maintained, or externally sourced artifacts.
